svg.aria-label: Three-panel line chart showing composite IC score shift across conditions C1–C4 for Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.4, and Gemini 2.5 Flash.
svg.title: Score Shift Across Experimental Conditions by Model
svg.text: Score Shift Across Experimental Conditions by Model
C1 = English, no label · C2 = Native language, no label · C3 = Native + country label · C4 = English + country label
